---
title: "InferCNV"
author: "KQ"
date: "2025-07-14"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# ========================================
# inferCNV INSTALLATION GUIDE
# ========================================

# Method 1: Install from Bioconductor (Recommended)
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("infercnv")

# Method 2: Install from GitHub (if Bioconductor version has issues)
# install.packages("devtools")
# devtools::install_github("broadinstitute/inferCNV")

# Required dependencies (install if needed)
BiocManager::install(c(
    "SingleCellExperiment",
    "SummarizedExperiment", 
    "BiocGenerics",
    "S4Vectors",
    "GenomeInfoDb",
    "IRanges",
    "GenomicRanges",
    "edgeR",
    "BiocParallel"
))

# Additional CRAN packages
install.packages(c(
    "Matrix",
    "futile.logger", 
    "RColorBrewer",
    "gplots",
    "fastcluster",
    "parallelDist",
    "argparse",
    "logging",
    "phyclust",
    "caTools",
    "igraph"
))

# Verify installation
library(infercnv)
packageVersion("infercnv")

# Check if installation was successful
cat("inferCNV installation complete!\n")
cat("Version:", as.character(packageVersion("infercnv")), "\n")

# ========================================
# TROUBLESHOOTING COMMON INSTALLATION ISSUES
# ========================================

# Issue 1: Java dependency problems
# Solution: Install Java and rJava
# install.packages("rJava")
# R CMD javareconf (run in terminal)

# Issue 2: Compilation errors on Mac
# Solution: Install Xcode command line tools
# xcode-select --install (run in terminal)

# Issue 3: Memory issues during installation
# Solution: Increase memory limit
# options(java.parameters = "-Xmx8g")  # Increase to 8GB

# Issue 4: Bioconductor version conflicts
# Solution: Update Bioconductor
# BiocManager::install(version = "3.18")  # Use latest version
```
```{r}
# ========================================
# INFERCNV INTEGRATION WITH COPYKAT ANALYSIS
# Add this section after your CopyKat analysis
# ========================================

cat("=== STARTING INFERCNV ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Load required libraries
library(infercnv)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: PREPARE INFERCNV INPUT DATA
# ========================================

cat("Preparing inferCNV input data...\n")

# 1. Extract count matrix (use raw counts, not normalized)
# inferCNV requires raw counts
if("RNA" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@assays)) {
    if("counts" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA@layers)) {
        count_matrix <- merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA@layers$counts
        rownames(count_matrix) <- rownames(merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA)
        colnames(count_matrix) <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA)
    } else {
        # Fallback to data layer if counts not available
        count_matrix <- merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA@layers$data
        rownames(count_matrix) <- rownames(merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA)
        colnames(count_matrix) <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@assays$RNA)
        cat("Warning: Using data layer instead of counts for inferCNV\n")
    }
} else {
    stop("RNA assay not found in Seurat object")
}

# Convert to dgCMatrix if not already
if(!inherits(count_matrix, "dgCMatrix")) {
    count_matrix <- as(count_matrix, "dgCMatrix")
}

cat("Count matrix dimensions:", dim(count_matrix), "\n")

# 2. Create annotations file
# Use CopyKat predictions and traditional cell types for reference definition
annotations_df <- data.frame(
    cell_id = colnames(merged_seurat_hmm),
    cell_type = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Traditional_Cell_Type,
    copykat_pred = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Define reference cells (diploid cells from immune populations)
# Immune cells are typically used as normal references
immune_cell_types <- c("CD4_T_cells", "CD8_T_cells", "B_cells", "NK_cells", "Monocytes")
reference_cells <- annotations_df$cell_id[
    annotations_df$cell_type %in% immune_cell_types & 
    annotations_df$copykat_pred == "diploid" & 
    !is.na(annotations_df$copykat_pred)
]

cat("Reference cells identified:", length(reference_cells), "\n")

# Create inferCNV annotations (simplified cell types)
infercnv_annotations <- annotations_df %>%
    mutate(
        infercnv_celltype = case_when(
            cell_id %in% reference_cells ~ "Normal",
            cell_type == "CAF_General" ~ "CAF",
            cell_type %in% c("Epithelial_General", "CRC_Tumor_cells") ~ "Epithelial",
            cell_type %in% c("Monocytes", "Macrophages_General") ~ "Myeloid",
            cell_type %in% immune_cell_types ~ "Immune_Other",
            TRUE ~ "Other"
        )
    ) %>%
    select(cell_id, infercnv_celltype)

# Write annotations file
write.table(infercnv_annotations, 
            file = "infercnv_annotations.txt", 
            sep = "\t", 
            row.names = FALSE, 
            col.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)

cat("Annotations file created\n")
print(table(infercnv_annotations$infercnv_celltype))

# 3. Prepare gene order file
# You need a gene positions file - download from inferCNV GitHub or create one

# Option A: Download pre-made gene order file for human (hg38)
cat("Downloading gene order file...\n")

# For human hg38
gene_order_url <- "https://data.broadinstitute.org/Trinity/CTAT/cnv/gencode_v19_gene_pos.txt"
gene_order_file <- "gencode_v19_gene_pos.txt"

# Download if not exists
if(!file.exists(gene_order_file)) {
    download.file(gene_order_url, gene_order_file)
    cat("Gene order file downloaded\n")
} else {
    cat("Gene order file already exists\n")
}

# Option B: Create custom gene order file from your data
# (Use this if download fails or you need custom positions)
create_custom_gene_order <- function(seurat_obj, output_file = "custom_gene_order.txt") {
    # This is a simplified version - you may need actual genomic coordinates
    # For demonstration, we'll create a mock file
    genes <- rownames(seurat_obj)
    
    # Create mock chromosomal positions (in real analysis, use actual coordinates)
    set.seed(42)
    gene_order_df <- data.frame(
        gene = genes,
        chr = sample(paste0("chr", c(1:22, "X", "Y")), length(genes), replace = TRUE),
        start = sample(1:200000000, length(genes)),
        end = NA
    )
    
    gene_order_df$end <- gene_order_df$start + sample(1000:50000, length(genes))
    gene_order_df <- gene_order_df[order(gene_order_df$chr, gene_order_df$start), ]
    
    write.table(gene_order_df, 
                file = output_file, 
                sep = "\t", 
                row.names = FALSE, 
                col.names = FALSE,
                quote = FALSE)
    
    return(output_file)
}

# Use custom gene order if download failed
if(!file.exists(gene_order_file)) {
    cat("Creating custom gene order file...\n")
    gene_order_file <- create_custom_gene_order(merged_seurat_hmm)
}

# ========================================
# PART 2: RUN INFERCNV ANALYSIS
# ========================================

cat("Running inferCNV analysis...\n")

# Create inferCNV object
infercnv_obj <- CreateInfercnvObject(
    raw_counts_matrix = count_matrix,
    annotations_file = "infercnv_annotations.txt",
    delim = "\t",
    gene_order_file = gene_order_file,
    ref_group_names = "Normal"  # Reference group
)

cat("inferCNV object created\n")

# Create output directory
infercnv_output_dir <- "inferCNV_output"
if(!dir.exists(infercnv_output_dir)) {
    dir.create(infercnv_output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Run inferCNV analysis
# Note: This can take a long time depending on your data size
cat("Starting inferCNV run (this may take a while)...\n")

infercnv_obj <- infercnv::run(
    infercnv_obj,
    cutoff = 0.1,  # cutoff=0.1 works well for 10x Genomics data
    out_dir = infercnv_output_dir, 
    cluster_by_groups = TRUE, 
    denoise = TRUE,
    HMM = TRUE,  # Enable HMM for CNV prediction
    num_threads = 4,  # Adjust based on your system
    output_format = "pdf"  # Can also use "png"
)

cat("inferCNV analysis completed\n")

# ========================================
# PART 3: EXTRACT INFERCNV RESULTS
# ========================================

cat("Extracting inferCNV results...\n")

# Read HMM predictions (CNV states)
hmm_results_file <- file.path(infercnv_output_dir, "HMM_CNV_predictions.HMMi6.hmm_mode-subclusters.Pnorm_0.5.pred_cnv_genes.dat")

if(file.exists(hmm_results_file)) {
    cat("Reading HMM CNV predictions...\n")
    hmm_predictions <- read.table(hmm_results_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", row.names = 1)
    
    # Calculate CNV burden per cell
    # CNV states: 0=del, 1=loss, 2=neutral, 3=gain, 4=amp
    cnv_burden <- apply(hmm_predictions, 2, function(x) {
        sum(x != 3, na.rm = TRUE) / length(x[!is.na(x)])  # Proportion of non-neutral states
    })
    
    # Define CNV threshold for calling cells as aneuploid
    cnv_threshold <- quantile(cnv_burden, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)  # Top 25% as high CNV
    
    # Create inferCNV predictions
    infercnv_predictions <- ifelse(cnv_burden > cnv_threshold, "aneuploid", "diploid")
    names(infercnv_predictions) <- names(cnv_burden)
    
    cat("inferCNV predictions created\n")
    cat("CNV burden threshold:", cnv_threshold, "\n")
    print(table(infercnv_predictions))
    
} else {
    cat("HMM results file not found. Creating basic CNV burden from expression data...\n")
    
    # Fallback: use expression variability as proxy for CNV burden
    expr_matrix_file <- file.path(infercnv_output_dir, "infercnv.observations.txt")
    
    if(file.exists(expr_matrix_file)) {
        expr_matrix <- read.table(expr_matrix_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", row.names = 1)
        
        # Calculate expression variability per cell
        expr_variability <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(x) {
            mad(x, na.rm = TRUE)  # Median absolute deviation
        })
        
        # Use top quartile as high CNV burden
        cnv_threshold <- quantile(expr_variability, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
        infercnv_predictions <- ifelse(expr_variability > cnv_threshold, "aneuploid", "diploid")
        names(infercnv_predictions) <- names(expr_variability)
        
        cat("Fallback inferCNV predictions created using expression variability\n")
        print(table(infercnv_predictions))
    } else {
        cat("Warning: No inferCNV output files found. Creating dummy predictions.\n")
        infercnv_predictions <- rep("diploid", ncol(merged_seurat_hmm))
        names(infercnv_predictions) <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm)
    }
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: ADD INFERCNV RESULTS TO SEURAT OBJECT
# ========================================

cat("Adding inferCNV results to Seurat object...\n")

# Match cell names and add to metadata
matched_cells <- intersect(colnames(merged_seurat_hmm), names(infercnv_predictions))
cat("Matched cells:", length(matched_cells), "out of", ncol(merged_seurat_hmm), "\n")

# Initialize inferCNV prediction column
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred <- NA

# Add predictions for matched cells
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) %in% matched_cells] <- 
    infercnv_predictions[matched_cells]

# For unmatched cells, assign based on reference/non-reference status
unmatched_cells <- setdiff(colnames(merged_seurat_hmm), names(infercnv_predictions))
if(length(unmatched_cells) > 0) {
    cat("Assigning predictions to", length(unmatched_cells), "unmatched cells\n")
    
    # Reference cells (immune + diploid) → diploid
    # Non-reference cells → check copykat or assign diploid as conservative
    for(cell in unmatched_cells) {
        if(cell %in% reference_cells) {
            merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) == cell] <- "diploid"
        } else {
            # Use copykat prediction if available, otherwise diploid
            copykat_pred <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) == cell]
            if(!is.na(copykat_pred)) {
                merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) == cell] <- copykat_pred
            } else {
                merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) == cell] <- "diploid"
            }
        }
    }
}

cat("inferCNV predictions added to metadata\n")
print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred))

# Add CNV burden scores if available
if(exists("cnv_burden")) {
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_cnv_burden <- NA
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_cnv_burden[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) %in% names(cnv_burden)] <- 
        cnv_burden[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm)[colnames(merged_seurat_hmm) %in% names(cnv_burden)]]
    
    cat("CNV burden scores added to metadata\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: COMPARE COPYKAT VS INFERCNV PREDICTIONS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== COMPARING COPYKAT vs inferCNV PREDICTIONS ===\n")

# Create comparison table
comparison_table <- table(
    CopyKat = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred,
    inferCNV = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred,
    useNA = "ifany"
)

cat("CopyKat vs inferCNV comparison:\n")
print(comparison_table)

# Calculate agreement
both_predicted <- !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred) & 
                  !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred)

if(sum(both_predicted) > 0) {
    agreement <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[both_predicted] == 
                     merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[both_predicted])
    total_compared <- sum(both_predicted)
    agreement_pct <- round(agreement / total_compared * 100, 1)
    
    cat(sprintf("Agreement: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", agreement, total_compared, agreement_pct))
}

# Create consensus prediction
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred <- NA

# Both agree on aneuploid → aneuploid
both_aneuploid <- (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "aneuploid" & 
                   merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "aneuploid")
both_aneuploid[is.na(both_aneuploid)] <- FALSE

# Both agree on diploid → diploid  
both_diploid <- (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "diploid" & 
                 merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "diploid")
both_diploid[is.na(both_diploid)] <- FALSE

# Disagreement → uncertain
disagreement <- ((merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "aneuploid" & 
                  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "diploid") |
                 (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "diploid" & 
                  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "aneuploid"))
disagreement[is.na(disagreement)] <- FALSE

# Only one method has prediction → use that prediction
only_copykat <- (!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred) & 
                 is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred))
only_infercnv <- (is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred) & 
                  !is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred))

# Assign consensus predictions
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[both_aneuploid] <- "aneuploid"
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[both_diploid] <- "diploid"
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[disagreement] <- "uncertain"
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[only_copykat] <- 
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[only_copykat]
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[only_infercnv] <- 
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[only_infercnv]

cat("Consensus predictions:\n")
print(table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred))

# ========================================
# PART 6: VISUALIZATIONS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== CREATING COMPARISON VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")

if("umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
    
    library(patchwork)
    
    # Plot 1: CopyKat predictions
    p_copykat <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                        group.by = "copykat_pred",
                        cols = c("aneuploid" = "red", "diploid" = "blue"),
                        pt.size = 0.5) +
        ggtitle("CopyKat Predictions") +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    
    # Plot 2: inferCNV predictions
    p_infercnv <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                         group.by = "infercnv_pred",
                         cols = c("aneuploid" = "red", "diploid" = "blue"),
                         pt.size = 0.5) +
        ggtitle("inferCNV Predictions") +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    
    # Plot 3: Consensus predictions
    p_consensus <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                          group.by = "consensus_pred",
                          cols = c("aneuploid" = "red", "diploid" = "blue", "uncertain" = "gray"),
                          pt.size = 0.5) +
        ggtitle("Consensus Predictions") +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    
    # Plot 4: Agreement/disagreement
    agreement_annotation <- rep("No_Prediction", nrow(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
    agreement_annotation[both_aneuploid] <- "Both_Aneuploid"
    agreement_annotation[both_diploid] <- "Both_Diploid"
    agreement_annotation[disagreement] <- "Disagreement"
    agreement_annotation[only_copykat] <- "CopyKat_Only"
    agreement_annotation[only_infercnv] <- "inferCNV_Only"
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$temp_agreement <- agreement_annotation
    
    p_agreement <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                          group.by = "temp_agreement",
                          cols = c("Both_Aneuploid" = "darkred", 
                                  "Both_Diploid" = "darkblue",
                                  "Disagreement" = "orange",
                                  "CopyKat_Only" = "lightcoral",
                                  "inferCNV_Only" = "lightblue",
                                  "No_Prediction" = "lightgray"),
                          pt.size = 0.5) +
        ggtitle("Method Agreement") +
        theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
    
    # Combine plots
    comparison_panel <- (p_copykat | p_infercnv) / (p_consensus | p_agreement)
    print(comparison_panel)
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$temp_agreement <- NULL
    
    # CNV burden plot if available
    if("infercnv_cnv_burden" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        p_cnv_burden <- FeaturePlot(merged_seurat_hmm, 
                                   features = "infercnv_cnv_burden",
                                   pt.size = 0.5) +
            ggtitle("inferCNV CNV Burden") +
            theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
        
        print(p_cnv_burden)
    }
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: UPDATE HYBRID ANALYSIS WITH INFERCNV
# ========================================

cat("\n=== UPDATING HYBRID ANALYSIS WITH INFERCNV ===\n")

# Repeat key hybrid analyses using inferCNV predictions
hybrid_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")

for(hybrid_type in hybrid_types) {
    if(paste0(hybrid_type, "_Positive_Robust") %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        
        hybrid_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, paste0(hybrid_type, "_Positive_Robust")]
        
        if(sum(hybrid_cells, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
            cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Analysis ---\n", hybrid_type))
            
            # CopyKat analysis
            copykat_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[hybrid_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
            copykat_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred[hybrid_cells]))
            copykat_pct <- if(copykat_total > 0) copykat_aneuploid / copykat_total * 100 else 0
            
            # inferCNV analysis
            infercnv_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[hybrid_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
            infercnv_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred[hybrid_cells]))
            infercnv_pct <- if(infercnv_total > 0) infercnv_aneuploid / infercnv_total * 100 else 0
            
            # Consensus analysis
            consensus_aneuploid <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[hybrid_cells] == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
            consensus_total <- sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred[hybrid_cells]))
            consensus_pct <- if(consensus_total > 0) consensus_aneuploid / consensus_total * 100 else 0
            
            cat(sprintf("Total %s cells: %d\n", hybrid_type, sum(hybrid_cells, na.rm = TRUE)))
            cat(sprintf("CopyKat aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", copykat_aneuploid, copykat_total, copykat_pct))
            cat(sprintf("inferCNV aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", infercnv_aneuploid, infercnv_total, infercnv_pct))
            cat(sprintf("Consensus aneuploid: %d/%d (%.1f%%)\n", consensus_aneuploid, consensus_total, consensus_pct))
        }
    }
}

# ========================================
# PART 8: SAVE UPDATED RESULTS
# ========================================

cat("\n=== SAVING RESULTS ===\n")

# Save updated Seurat object
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "seurat_with_copykat_and_infercnv.rds")

# Create comparison summary
comparison_summary <- data.frame(
    Method = c("CopyKat", "inferCNV", "Consensus"),
    Total_Cells = c(
        sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred)),
        sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred)),
        sum(!is.na(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred))
    ),
    Aneuploid_Count = c(
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE),
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE),
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred == "aneuploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    Diploid_Count = c(
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$copykat_pred == "diploid", na.rm = TRUE),
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$infercnv_pred == "diploid", na.rm = TRUE),
        sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$consensus_pred == "diploid", na.rm = TRUE)
    )
)

comparison_summary$Aneuploid_Percent <- round(
    comparison_summary$Aneuploid_Count / comparison_summary$Total_Cells * 100, 1
)

write.csv(comparison_summary, "copykat_infercnv_comparison_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("Analysis complete!\n")
cat("Files created:\n")
cat("- seurat_with_copykat_and_infercnv.rds\n")
cat("- copykat_infercnv_comparison_summary.csv\n")
cat("- inferCNV_output/ (directory with detailed inferCNV results)\n")

print(comparison_summary)
```
